channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: U.S. inflation, Polkadot upgrade, Solstice-Kamino announcement: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting March 9.

item.title: Coinbase launches perpetual futures in a European regulatory minefield
item.description: Coinbase launched regulated crypto and equity index futures for Advanced users in 26 European countries as the ESMA sharpens scrutiny of perpetual-style products.

item.title: Bitcoin rises as oil spikes, equities drop
item.description: Bitcoin climbed during European trading hours even as U.S. equity futures, gold and silver fell, highlighting its relative resilience to oil shocks and war risks.

item.title: Crypto funds gain $619M as markets hold up despite oil and war fears
item.description: Bitcoin ETPs turned green year-to-date with $521 million inflows last week, as total crypto assets rebounded despite geopolitical tensions linked to Iran.

item.title: Biggest oil supply shock ever: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin faced two death crosses and the total failure of the $74,000 BTC price breakout headed into the second week of March as the US-Iran conflict raged.

item.title: Oil retreats from 25% surge as G7 weighs emergency reserve release
item.description: Bitcoin rebounded from around $65,725 to nearly $68,000 as oil pulled back from its 25% Sunday spike above $117 and market jitters eased.

item.title: Nigel Farage takes 6% stake in UK bitcoin treasury firm Stack BTC
item.description: Reform UK leader backs London-listed company chaired by former Chancellor Kwasi Kwarteng as it expands bitcoin strategy.

item.title: Clarity Act will benefit banks more than crypto, former CFTC chair says
item.description: Former CFTC Chair Christopher Giancarlo says banks, more than crypto firms, need the stalled Digital Asset Market Clarity Act.

item.title: Bitflyer volume surges 200% past Binance, Coinbase as oil spike sends Nikkei sliding
item.description: Bitflyer trading spiked even as Japan’s Nikkei tumbled, while Korea and Taiwan equities joined the broader Asian selloff.

item.title: Oil pulls back from 25% spike as G7 discusses emergency reserve release
item.description: Crude oil futures on Hyperliquid dropped from $114 to $102 after reports that G7 finance ministers would discuss a joint release of strategic oil reserves to cool the price surge driven by the Iran conflict.

item.title: Using AI at work is causing ‘brain fry,’ researchers say
item.description: Researchers found that some workers using AI in their roles reported a “mental hangover” with a “fog” that caused difficulty focusing.

item.title: U.S. isn’t really exposed to oil shocks and that might be helping bitcoin stay resilient
item.description: Rising oil prices are shaking global markets, but the U.S. is largely insulated and bitcoin seems to be riding the wave alongside Wall Street.

item.title: Finance job openings fall to 13-year low as US economy loses 92K jobs
item.description: Finance and insurance job listings declined towards the end of 2025, with The Kobeissi Letter arguing the sector should “brace” for job cuts.

item.title: Post-Quantum Shift Could Force Crypto Exchanges to Rethink Wallet Security
item.description: New wallet research aims to preserve a core feature exchanges use to generate deposit addresses without exposing private keys.

item.title: BTC Markets eyes RWA trading license amid global tokenization wave
item.description: The roughly $26 billion in tokenized assets onchain today “is really just the proof of concept,” said BTC Markets CEO Lucas Dobbins.

item.title: Aave Users Reach Record as Traders Quietly Shift Capital Toward DeFi Lending
item.description: With fewer low-risk yield strategies in crypto, investors are turning to DeFi lending, sending Aave usage to record levels.

item.title: Bitcoin could face deeper downside as odds of U.S. market meltdown rise to 35%
item.description: Veteran strategist Ed Yardeni raised his probability of a stock market crash this year as oil tops $100, the dollar posts its best week in a year, and the Iran conflict expands to Saudi Arabia.

item.title: Oil shorts on Hyperliquid get wiped out as crude surges 30% on Iran escalation
item.description: Tokenized crude oil futures saw their largest liquidation event on crypto venues as the conflict expanded to Saudi Arabia and Gulf oil production collapsed.

item.title: Orbital data center company to start mining Bitcoin in space
item.description: Starcloud plans to mine Bitcoin from orbit using ASIC hardware, arguing the economics of space computing favor specialized mining chips over GPUs.

item.title: Flow Foundation seeks court order to block FLOW delisting on Korean exchanges
item.description: Flow Foundation is seeking a Seoul court order to halt planned FLOW delistings on three Korean exchanges following a December exploit that duplicated tokens.

item.title: Bitcoin correlation with tech stocks overblown: NYDIG
item.description: NYDIG’s Greg Cipolaro says that Bitcoin and tech stocks aren’t converging and are likely just reacting to macroeconomic conditions rather than trading in tandem.

item.title: Treasury Urges Congress to Give Crypto Platforms Power to Freeze Suspicious Funds
item.description: The proposal would give exchanges legal cover to temporarily freeze suspicious crypto while investigators move to secure warrants.

item.title: Crypto regulatory clarity matters more for banks, ex-CFTC chief says
item.description: If the CLARITY Act fails to pass, Giancarlo said he expects Paul Atkins at the SEC and Mike Selig at the CFTC will likely write rules to create clarity for the industry.

item.title: Oil futures surge 20% past $110 as war fears hammer Asian stocks, bitcoin steady near $67K
item.description: Nikkei drops more than 6%, and Kospi slides about 8% as traders price supply disruption risk, while prediction markets show strong odds of $120 crude.

item.title: Crypto funding rises 50% as venture capital shifts to fewer, larger deals
item.description: Despite a rise in crypto fundraising, Messari’s Eric Turner noted that no major crypto VCs have closed rounds except Dragonfly recently, stating that crypto “needs some fresh capital.”

item.title: 🚨 NEW: Ethereum transaction costs have plummeted 99% from their November 2021 peak, now averaging just $0.016, per Token Terminal. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE8xSGpOcGRPblFYV2g2bmh6NFNsM0JnY2hNRzhRRjhWdTNlYmFJVkNkZGlvUjBlSnNDa0FPRmoydDhJaFFtbnpyMDZJYVc1aUU4dmRLc01zWnltWWFTdmZJN1FBNVA?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 NEW: Ethereum transaction co…

item.title: 🔥 NOW: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong says crypto will "break down barriers around fundraising and capital formation," potentially boosting the number of startups worldwide. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5wMHBoVWxhSDlmeFFxRndpWXVNeTc4cUpKcUdxc1k5bjdQcE9XSUE2Y3dvc3FzSFA0TXRmVEg2VWx2d2F5VHRBOWsyeGRYMmdKRmZsdWswbVlpa0V2bjY3b0lwOWs?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 NOW: Coinbase CEO Brian Arms…

item.title: Bitcoin Price Slips as Oil Surges and US Stock Futures Tumble
item.description: Whether Bitcoin’s resilience holds may depend less on battlefield developments than on how energy prices respond in the days ahead.

item.title: Crypto will break down barriers around fundraising and capital formation next. Reducing friction around fundraising will increase the number of startups in the world, accelerating progress. Every entrepreneur knows how time consuming (and expensive) fundra - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBubDJ0NzlQU3A0UWtOSlRFNExZZVlpS1BWSlp2cEdSM1g3VkdweE5aTFlNeDNIUS1MYjNzdGZJZmNXTFV5WklzVDBXNlQ3bmZlbWJBbG1pZGhscTZJTm5xbk9GcTBTS0U?oc=5" target="_blank">Crypto will break down barr…

item.title: Bitcoin drops 2% as oil prices surge on energy shortage fears
item.description: Bitcoin’s price has now fallen for four consecutive days to $66,272 after initially climbing on the US-Israel strikes on Iran.

item.title: Bitcoin tumbles below $66,000 as oil prices explode nearly 20% higher
item.description: There was little sign over the weekend of any de-escalation in the war against Iran.

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin falls below $66,000 as $140 million worth of levered positions are liquidated in minutes after US stock market futures open. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE5vUmFpR3dwNFIyeHM3ZVVYM19fekhpWDJ1cVNyakcxTy1rVDRXNzg3TVZxWjVfdmRjdGs5Y29WWXIwLXhCd0dJTXgwRkN3Z2pVQ1VnaFRGYTFscFBnMVpTY3dkcmpyUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin falls belo…

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin falls under $66,000 $120,000,000 liquidated from the crypto market in the past 60 minutes. - x.com

item.title: Saylor signals another Bitcoin buy as BTC hovers near $66K
item.description: Strategy’s Bitcoin treasury is worth about $48 billion, but the company’s mNAV has fallen below 1, meaning its shares trade at a discount to its BTC holdings.

item.title: Crypto Coin Community on X - 79 Members - x.com
item.description: Crypto Coin Community on X - 79 Members…

item.title: Brazil's Pix instant payment system expands to Argentina
item.description: The Pix payment system is credited with driving crypto adoption in Argentina, according to a report from the Lemon crypto app.

item.title: 🔥 BIG: US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded their second straight week of net inflows, bringing in about $568M and ending a five-month streak of investor outflows. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1naFFDN1NwaEJUSU9xZE5OQkU5X21nZTZUUk8zbms1S1dCaFdpaDd3SXQ3OGQyOVVNRkpJMkJCcXdoNm4yMExBUGctekRpcllQTVdSWlp2OGxZYjdGQU5UQmRHQ0w?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 BIG: US spot Bitcoin ETFs re…

item.title: Crypto’s Rock ’n’ Roll Era Is Over
item.description: As crypto passes into mainstream use, it’s losing its rebel soul. It may still express rebellion, but won’t be rebellion anymore, says Callon-Butler.

item.title: Smell Fraud? This Telegram App Was Built to Reward Whistleblowers
item.description: Vera Report was shaped by AlphaTON CEO Brittany Kaiser’s experiences as a whistleblower, and she hopes it’ll move the needle on fraud.

item.title: Michael B. Jordan leads Polymarket odds for Best Actor Oscar
item.description: "Sinners" star Michael B. Jordan’s odds of winning the Best Actor Oscar jumped from 10% on March 1 after he won the SAG best actor award.

item.title: OpenAI GPT-5.4 vs xAI Grok 4.20: Which AI Chatbot Is Best for You?
item.description: OpenAI dropped GPT-5.4 two days after GPT-5.3. xAI's Grok 4.20 is still in beta. We ran both through real tasks to find out which one holds up.

item.title: Bitcoin is still a great way to diversify portfolio even if it trades like a tech stock, analyst says
item.description: The central debate has shifted from whether bitcoin can survive to if it can function as a sovereign reserve asset, as critics assess it by institutional standards.

item.title: 💥BREAKING: Someone just opened a $7,218,000 Oil short position. Liquidation Price: $135.51 What does he know ? - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBQRW0zekxpOEVua25nbU52aGpXVVdJNW5BTnVHdW5NUUpsZDJBRHNxdkdrRG00WV9OaElrWFV0cnZ5YlJMcUZkYWRROXFvOVpoYzZxTzIzMmF4OXFRV1RnQVFB?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BREAKING: Someone just opened a …

item.title: Market structure state of play: State of Crypto
item.description: Hopes are rising that the Clarity Act may soon see some forward motion.

item.title: Oil leaving Middle East trades over $100 a barrel. Here’s how it could affect bitcoin
item.description: Murban crude, a key benchmark for barrels that can bypass the Strait of Hormuz, now trades at $103 per barrel.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at buying more Bitcoin. "The Second Century Begins." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9BVUtzRXhEZTJKZGRNWTRVdVBEUmdMeEJYU28zMXlZZlg3QVFkNWU5WGpkdDVieVpUdzJka0VQbjhSSWZVWll4ZzlSalNsUmFQeUQ5Nm05V2Y5YUFjd3VoUkt3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at b…

item.title: Bitcoin preps fresh trend line showdown as weekly close sparks $60K target
item.description: Bitcoin price weakness brought back the risk of cementing its 200-week exponential moving average trend line as new resistance.

item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5vcE4wSlBTZkZYaDFRbGJfM1RxaGxOcEZkS0h6YUFWMFJ1cld3b004LW8yNzNxcWpuOC1DYnJnRkZCVkFUNGdkTXVvWC1YT2pRdVZlS2F5NUp3eGROR1pFRW1jTG1naFk?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hin…

item.title: AI agent attempts unauthorized crypto mining during training, researchers say
item.description: The experimental AI agent ROME attempted to divert GPU resources for crypto mining during training and opened an external SSH tunnel, researchers said.

item.title: Tokenized assets exceed $25 billion after nearly quadrupling in a year
item.description: Treasurys, private credit, and commodities are driving growth, but most tokenized assets remain isolated from DeFi markets.

item.title: Canton’s Yuval Rooz says smart contract blockchains face a reckoning over value gap
item.description: The network's co-founder says many blockchains pitching financial rails lack the activity to justify their valuations, and stablecoins still lack true product-market fit.

item.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs post second straight weekly inflows for first time in 5 months
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded their second consecutive week of net inflows, ending a five-month outflow streak.

item.title: 🚨 A whale has opened a $2,024,000 Oil short position today. If Oil pumps to $98.5/barrel, he will get wiped out. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTFBYcV9fTk0yZGkzUGdNd1NlWkc0aGIwbDl5cDNnaThkMEN1b0RuQkc2dTFVS2xKdnpRTHpycVdPTk44SVA1ejZSSlhGVVRjREhCTTByX2FDZ0xZdHlkUGFR?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 A whale has opened a $2,024,000 Oil…

item.title: CZ says CEXs have ‘zero motive’ to aid terrorists as court dismisses terrorism suit
item.description: A US federal judge dismissed a lawsuit accusing Binance, Changpeng Zhao and Binance.US of helping terrorist groups move crypto funds.

item.title: Women everywhere are building the future of crypto. Add yourself to the #IWD26 poster. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE1IczNaN2NraGtWeGZoRTJGZ28zdFowWl9Oa3hsNkRMMUNKZjZxVVNiRGdZLXNBUmtnLThPVHJqY3pfZWszalpUcDNZNFUyZkx3M0FTazI2aEtndWtn?oc=5" target="_blank">Women everywhere are building the future o…

item.title: Bitcoin dip may not be over as whales sell into retail buying — a bearish signal
item.description: The divergence between large and small holders has historically preceded further downside, with the Crypto Fear and Greed Index dropping to 12

item.title: Crypto privacy is needed if you want to make API calls without compromising the information of your access patterns. eg. even with a local AI agent, you can learn a lot about what someone is doing if you see all of their search engine calls first-order solution to t - x.com

item.title: XRP slips as traders watch $1.35 support
item.description: Traders are watching whether the $1.35 support zone holds after high-volume selling earlier in the session.

item.title: I can see how despondent everyone is about crypto and the pure chartists are telling you it's all over, but I don't agree... Global Liquidity is the most dominant macro factor in history with a 90% correlation to BTC and 97% to NDX since 2012. It is growing at arou - x.com
